title: The Big Picture: Coal market
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
The seaborne coal market continues to tighten, driven by trade disputes and energy shortages. We look at how its impact on the dry market has changed since we last covered this topic. Prices continue to rise
Since we last focused on the volatile global coal market a couple of months ago, it has tightened further, fuelling more price increases and contributing to the ongoing rally in freight.
